meta.title: TiDB Cloud Startup Program | Free $100K Credits
meta.description: Launch your startup fast with $100,000 in TiDB Cloud credits. Scale without limits. Join the TiDB Cloud Startup Program today.

sections.headline: Launch Fast. Scale without Limits. Get $100,000 in TiDB Cloud Credits
sections.subheadline: Get $100,000 in TiDB Cloud credits to power your startup's growth. Build the database layer your application deserves.

items.title: Apply
items.description: Tell us about your startup. Share your vision, team, and current stage. Applications reviewed within 5 business days.

items.title: Get Approved
items.description: Once approved, receive your $100,000 credit voucher via email. Start using TiDB Cloud immediately.

items.title: Build & Scale
items.description: Deploy your database, build your application, and scale without worry. We're here to support your success.

sections.title: Everything You Need to Scale
sections.subtitle: From day one to series C, we've got you covered.

items.title: $100,000 in Credits
items.description: Use across TiDB Cloud resources for 12 months. Perfect for development, testing, and production workloads.

items.title: Dedicated Support
items.description: Direct access to our startup success team. Priority support to help you move fast and solve problems quickly.

items.title: Founder Community
items.description: Connect with other startup founders using TiDB. Share experiences, best practices, and growth strategies.

items.title: Technical Resources
items.description: Workshops, webinars, and documentation to help your team get up to speed quickly and build efficiently.

items.title: Scale on Your Terms
items.description: Start small and grow. Auto-scaling capabilities ensure your database grows with your traffic and data.

items.title: Enterprise Security
items.description: Grade-A security features at startup-friendly prices. HIPAA, SOC2, and compliance ready from day one.

items.q: Who is eligible for the TiDB Cloud Startup Program?
items.a: Early-stage startups (typically pre-Series B) that are building with databases. Your company should be less than 5 years old and not a subsidiary of a larger enterprise.

items.q: How long are the $100,000 credits valid?
items.a: Credits are valid for 12 months from the date of approval. Unused credits expire after 12 months.

items.q: Can I use the credits for multiple clusters?
items.a: Yes, you can distribute your credits across multiple clusters and environments for development, testing, and production.

items.q: What happens after my 12 months of credits expire?
items.a: We offer startup pricing rates well beyond your initial credit period. Many of our startups find our ongoing pricing very affordable as they grow.

items.q: Do the credits include technical support?
items.a: Yes, all startup program participants receive priority support and access to our dedicated startup success team.

items.q: Can I transfer my credits to another company?
items.a: Credits are non-transferable and tied to the company that applied. They cannot be sold or exchanged for cash.

items.label: Startups Joined

items.quote: The startup program's support team was invaluable. They helped us optimize queries and architecture decisions that saved us time and money.

items.quote: We needed a database that could handle our rapid growth. TiDB Cloud's automatic scaling and the startup credits made it a no-brainer.
items.author: Priya Patel, VP Engineering, NextGen Commerce
